name: Reuben Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup sauerkraut, unwashed and squeezed very dry
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Place dough into quiche pan and flute edges; sprinkle with caraway seed and bake for 7 minutes.
Fill shell with corned beef. Spread with mustard. Top with sauerkraut, then cheese. Mix eggs, cream, onion and dry mustard; blend well. Pour over contents and bake for 40 minutes or until an inserted knife comes out clean. Remove from oven and cool for 5 minutes. Then serve. Serves 6 to 8.
